title: Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple
tagline: Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple (Tamil: திருப்பள்ளி முக்கூடல் திருநேத்திரநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Tirupalli Mukkudal in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu,
overview.description: Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple (Tamil: திருப்பள்ளி முக்கூடல் திருநேத்திரநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Tirupalli Mukkudal in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Kekkarai. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Tirunethranathar. His consort, Parvati, is known as Mayilmevum Kanni.

topPlaces.name: Thyagaraja Temple, Tiruvarur
topPlaces.description: Thyagaraja Temple is a Shiva temple, located in the town of Thiruvarur in Tamil Nadu state, India. Shiva is worshiped in the form of a lingam as Thyagarajaswami, also known as Putridankondar.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvarur
topPlaces.description: Thiruvarur (Tamil: [t̪iɾuʋaːɾuːɾ]) also spelt as Tiruvarur is a town in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is the administrative headquarters of Thiruvarur district and Thiruvarur taluk.

topPlaces.name: Veerateeswarar Temple, Thiruvirkudi
topPlaces.description: Veerateeswarar Temple (also called Thiruvirkudi Veerateeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple located at Thiruvirkudi in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Veerateswarar and his consort is known as Elavar Kuzhali.

topPlaces.name: Adiyakkamangalam
topPlaces.description: Adiyakkamangalam is a village panchayat located in the south Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Located at 5 km from Tiruvarur (East), 15 km from Nagappattinam, it is on the east border of Tiruvarur district.

topPlaces.name: Dakshinakokarnesvarar Temple, Pulivalam
topPlaces.description: Dakshinakokarnesvarar Temple, Pulivalam is a Shiva temple in Pulivalam in Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu (India).

topPlaces.name: Devarkandanallur
topPlaces.description: Devarkandanallur is a village in the Thiruvarur taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Alivalam
topPlaces.description: Alivalam is a village in the Tiruvarur taluk of Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Formerly this village was called 'Arivalam'.

topPlaces.name: Agarathirunallur
topPlaces.description: Agarathirunallur is a village in the Kudavasal taluk of Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: Thyagaraja Temple is a Shiva temple, located in the town of Thiruvarur in Tamil Nadu state, India. Shiva is worshiped in the form of a lingam as Thyagarajaswami, also known as Putridankondar.
Thiruvarur (Tamil: [t̪iɾuʋaːɾuːɾ]) also spelt as Tiruvarur is a town in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is the administrative headquarters of Thiruvarur district and Thiruvarur taluk.

Veerateeswarar Temple (also called Thiruvirkudi Veerateeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple located at Thiruvirkudi in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Veerateswarar and his consort is known as Elavar Kuzhali.

Adiyakkamangalam is a village panchayat located in the south Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Located at 5 km from Tiruvarur (East), 15 km from Nagappattinam, it is on the east border of Tiruvarur district.
Dakshinakokarnesvarar Temple, Pulivalam is a Shiva temple in Pulivalam in Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu (India).
Devarkandanallur is a village in the Thiruvarur taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.
Alivalam is a village in the Tiruvarur taluk of Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Formerly this village was called 'Arivalam'.
Agarathirunallur is a village in the Kudavasal taluk of Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (104 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (106 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thyagaraja Temple, Tiruvarur, Thiruvarur, Veerateeswarar Temple, Thiruvirkudi, Adiyakkamangalam, Dakshinakokarnesvarar Temple, Pulivalam.
